name: worker-default
description: Default policy for worker agents. Safety rules, escalation on failure, skill preferences.

rules.message: Network access requested: {{action.command}} — approve or deny?

rules.description: Allow the agent to modify its own source files, skills, and extension code for self-improvement
rules.condition: action modifies files in src/, skills/, or .pi/extensions/

rules.description: Block rm -rf on root or home paths
rules.message: Blocked: dangerous rm command on root path
Blocked: sudo not permitted for worker agents

rules.description: Block commands that dump environment variables (may contain secrets)
rules.message: Blocked: environment dump may expose secrets

rules.description: Escalate to executive after 3 consecutive failures
Escalate when top candidate value is very low
rules.message: No high-confidence actions available — requesting guidance

rules.description: Auto-complete when all success criteria are met

params.summary: All success criteria met — task complete

rules.description: Prevent runaway bash loops (>5 in 3 seconds)

action.description: Rate limiting: too many rapid bash commands

rules.description: Boost arxiv-research when task involves papers or algorithms
Boost code-search when task involves finding functions
Log whenever a skill action is selected

impasse.escalateMessage: Worker is stuck and requesting executive guidance
